title: Russias Crude Exports Navigate Demand Shifts And Sanctions
section_path: Russias Crude Exports Navigate Demand Shifts And Sanctions
section_path_text: Russias Crude Exports Navigate Demand Shifts And Sanctions
summary:
Main
Russian crude exports have fallen sharply in the first two weeks of July, with the impact partially mitigated by lower demand from China. Growing sanctions are impinging on tonnage supply for Russian trade in the short-term. By Serena Huang
Russian seaborne crude exports have sharply declined in the first two weeks of July, reaching 2.7mbd, the lowest since December 2022.
